name: @vaipakam/agent
description: Vaipakam agent Cloudflare Worker (Stage 3 PR4 of the Worker split — see docs/DesignsAndPlans/Stage3WorkerSplitPlan.md). Broadest of the three Workers — owns proactive notifications (periodic interest pre-notify, push + telegram dispatchers), cross-chain monitoring (buy-watchdog reconciliation, daily oracle snapshot), public Farcaster Frame at /frames/active-loans, operator services (server-side aggregator quote proxies at /quote/{0x,1inch} and Blockaid scan proxy at /scan/blockaid), the Telegram bot webhook (/tg/webhook), the diagnostics record capture endpoint (/diag/record), and the frontend-facing settings endpoints (/thresholds PUT + /link/telegram POST). Holds aggregator API keys + Push channel signer + Telegram bot token + KEEPER_PRIVATE_KEY (used by daily oracle snapshot signing); no autonomous liquidation (apps/keeper) and no chain → D1 indexing (apps/indexer).
